generated_oml:
instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin system under study"
]

instance PhysicalTwinSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensing component collecting real-time data from Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhysicalTwinSensorData
]

instance PhysicalTwinSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalTwinSensor
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data collected from Physical Twin over time"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PhysicalTwinSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, StateEstimationAlgorithm, OptimizationAlgorithm, SupervisoryController, MonitoringAlgorithm, SimulationAlgorithm
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model derived from CAD data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, MonitoringAlgorithm
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using differential equations for dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationAlgorithm, OptimizationAlgorithm
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model components for system analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm that updates model parameters with estimates from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetectionAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithm identifying anomalies in system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimation algorithm inferring system states from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimizationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithm enhancing system efficiency through parameter adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controller for automated adjustments to the Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance MonitoringAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitoring algorithm evaluating performance against operational thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance SimulationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation algorithm replicating Physical Twin behavior for prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitoring service to evaluate safety and optimal performance using real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyCheckInsight, PerformanceEvaluationInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Prediction service through simulation models replicating Physical Twin behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedStateInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service using optimizers to enhance system efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedConfigurationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control service through supervisory controllers for automated adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedAdjustmentAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection service using algorithms to identify anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation service to infer system states from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EstimatedStateInsight
]

instance SafetyCheckInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety check insight generated from monitoring service"
]

instance PerformanceEvaluationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance evaluation insight against operational thresholds"
]

instance PredictedStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted state of the Physical Twin based on simulation models"
]

instance OptimizedConfigurationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized configuration for system efficiency"
]

instance AutomatedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment action based on control service"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detected insight from fault detection algorithm"
]

instance EstimatedStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated system state inferred from sensor data"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwin, PhysicalTwinSensor
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update models with best parameter estimates from sensor data; monitors check for safety and optimality violations, triggering corrective actions on the Physical Twin."
]
